name: SEO Data Collector
description: Pulls fresh GSC + GA4 + (optional) production-DB data for one site. Outputs the standardized run-dir layout that every other agent in this suite reads.

confirmation_flow.description: Pipeline-stage agent — driven by upstream (seo-opportunity-agent / responder-agent). Confirmation gating happens at the upstream agent (seo-reporter emails recs; responder-agent dispatches user replies).
